pre_conditions: At least one open MYX position (recipe will place one if needed)
Sufficient USDC balance for $10 margin addition

steps.description: Check for existing positions, place order if none
steps.expression: (function(){var c=Engine.context.PerpsController;return c.getPositions().then(function(r){var myx=r.filter(function(p){return p.providerId==='myx'});if(myx.length>0)return JSON.stringify({action:'existing',positionCount:myx.length});return c.getMarketDataWithPrices().then(function(markets){var m=markets.filter(function(x){return x.providerId==='myx'})[0];if(!m)return JSON.stringify({error:'no MYX markets'});return c.placeOrder({symbol:m.symbol,isBuy:true,orderType:'market',size:'0.05',leverage:10,usdAmount:'120',maxSlippageBps:500,currentPrice:parseFloat(m.price)}).then(function(){return JSON.stringify({action:'placed',positionCount:1})})})})})()

steps.description: Add $10 margin to first MYX position
